description: Characters devoted to faith, spiritual practice, and divine service.
characters: A disciplined soul devoted to contemplation and inner peace.
A servant of the divine who tends to the faithful.
A mystic who speaks truths from beyond mortal understanding.
A devout traveler journeying to a sacred place.
A wandering holy person who serves the poor and forgotten.
A young initiate learning the ways of a sacred order.
A holy warrior who fights for faith and justice.
A divine servant who channels holy power to heal and protect.
A champion of righteousness sworn to uphold a sacred oath.
